title: Reduce time spent on IO and Network during kpod tests
body: If we could preload images into a storage space and overlay them as test storage spaces, we could reduce the time spent doing IO and pulling images over the network.  Every integration test for kpod gets a fresh/temporary storage space. So any test that uses and image, has to pull it now.

comments.body: @rhatdan , closing now with the solution we are using.
